name: Bitcoin
description: Bitcoin is the first and largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, serving as a decentralized digital store of value and peer-to-peer payment network.

name: Ethereum
description: Ethereum is a decentralized blockchain platform that enables smart contracts and decentralized applications (dApps), and is the second-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization.

name: Solana
description: Solana is a high-performance blockchain platform designed for decentralized applications, known for fast transaction speeds and low fees.

name: Bittensor
description: Bittensor (TAO) is a decentralized machine learning network that incentivizes AI model training and inference through a blockchain-based reward system.
